texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: :  1. Answer any FIVE full questions, choosing one full question from each unit.
texts.text: :  1. Answer any FIVE full questions, choosing one full question from each unit.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 2. Missing data, if any, may be suitably assumed.
texts.text: Missing data, if any, may be suitably assumed.

table_cells.text: Discuss the needs of layered technology in software engineering. Explain SDLC with neat diagram.
Identify the fundamental activities of software engineering and agile development techniques.
Analyze the necessities and issues of software life cycle model for virtual doctor health recommendation problem.
Construct waterfall model with neat diagram. Examine the problems encountered when applying the waterfall model.
Discuss the steps involved in rapid application development model with neat diagram.
Compare and contrast different life cycle models.
Explain the SRS document and design document. Compile the skeletal structure of SRS document with the standard specified by IEEE/ANSI 830_1998.
Construct a Level-1 DFD for library management system software.
Perceive the types of requirements for 'Online railway reservation system" with the help of requirements engineering and check the completeness and consistency of your requirements.
Design and develop State Transition diagrams for coffee machine.

table_cells.text: Compare and contrast cohesion and coupling in the context of software design.
Discover the difficulties and challenges in 'customer interaction' process. Explain a formal procedure used for customer interaction.
Discuss the software project management concepts in detail.
Analyze any two metrics which are used to measure the software in detail. Discuss clearly the advantages and disadvantages of these metrics.
Discuss briefly on Empirical Estimation Techniques and how do you estimate the cost involved.
Discuss the COCOMO model with the help of an example.
Analyze the need for project scheduling and team structures in software project management and describe them with suitable example.

Make use of the values of size in KLOC and different cost drivers for a project are given below: size=200 KLOC Cost driver: Software reliability = 1.15 Use of software tools = 0.91 Product complexity = 0.85 Execution time constraint = 1.00 Calculate the effort for three types of projects viz. organic, semidetached and embedded, using COCOMO model.
Explain the principles and elements of agile methods.

Considering a rapidly changing client requirement scenario, design and demonstrate how Agile provides better outcomes than traditional models like Waterfall in terms of project adaptability and stakeholder satisfaction.
Design the Kanban method to improve the workflow efficiency in a software development team, and discuss the potential limitations need to be considered when scaling it for larger projects.
Describe how using project boards and enriching issues within Kanban boards can enhance team collaboration and task visibility especially in managing complex software development projects.

table_cells.text: In the context of Jira Scrum projects, design the Quick Search and Basic Search functionalities that can effectively be used to improve sprint planning and issue tracking efficiency.
Demonstrate the use of JQL to identify bottlenecks in a Scrum or Kanban project. Discuss the advantages it can offer over basic filtering methods in Jira.
Construct an Extreme Programming (XP) life cycle that support continuous feedback and improvement. Analyse in what types of projects might this approach face limitations.
Formulate the structure and roles within an XP team that foster collaboration and high-quality code. Predict the possible challenges that could arise in a distributed team setting.
Analyze a class diagram for an SCM system with classes like Configuration Item, Version, Change Request, and Repository. Evaluate its suitability for managing version control and change management.
Design a configuration management process that ensures consistency and traceability in large-scale software projects. Predict the risks can arise if this process is poorly implemented.
Develop a version control system contributing to collaborative software development. Discuss the challenges might teams face when integrating VCS into continuous integration workflows.

A Software Developer is trying to develop highly reliable software used in online shopping applications. He has to carry out thorough testing of the software in order to have negligible errors. Design the same by applying different tasks of SCM process.
